biological_replicate: Separate inductions from iPSCs to neurons were regarded as biological replicates and n = 3
technical_replicate: Three analyses were performed per sample
experimental_design: Separate inductions from iPSCs to neurons were regarded as biological replicates
factor_value: isolated EVs by size exclusion chromatography from human induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC)-derived neurons.
number_of_technical_replicates: Three analyses were performed per sample
number_of_samples: 3 biological replicates and 4 fractions = 3 × 4 = 12 total samples.
